title: metastelma ovalifolium
intro: Metastelma ovalifolium, also known as the oval-leafed metastelma or devil's claw, is a plant species native to tropical Africa and Asia. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Metastelma ovalifolium include relief from pain, fever reduction, and treatment of skin conditions such as acne and eczema. Herbal preparations of the plant are typically made by drying the leaves and roots, then using them to create teas, infusions, or tinctures for medicinal purposes.
